banner: Hey there! I'm a Computer Science student at the LSA Honors College at the University of Michigan. Thanks for taking the time to stop by!. I promise not to make any off-by-one errors while you're here.
about: Originally from India, I lived in Dubai before moving to Ann Arbor for college. I'm a software engineer specializing in full-stack development, data science, and machine learning. Outside of coding, I enjoy reading, Bollywood music, table tennis, and hitting the gym. In 2020, I weighed 140kg and decided to make a change for my health and family's peace of mind. Through that fitness journey, I founded an online community called Fitness Freak to help others with similar goals.
